name: 5pc Kitchen Utensil Starter Set Gray - Room Essentials™
description:
Complete your cooking essentials with this 5-Piece Kitchen Utensil Starter Set from Room Essentials™. Crafted from nylon material in a versatile gray shade, the set includes a slotted turner, turner, pasta spoon, spoon, and slotted spoon for versatile cooking applications. Whether setting up your first kitchen or refreshing your current collection, these dishwasher-safe utensils are perfect for everyday cooking.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
